# Parakey

Canonical project brief for agents:
https://rcourtman.github.io/parakey/llms.txt

Full brief:
https://rcourtman.github.io/parakey/llms-full.txt

Source:
https://github.com/rcourtman/parakey

Parakey is a free MIT-licensed menu-bar app for local push-to-talk dictation on Apple Silicon Macs. It runs Parakeet TDT v3 through FluidAudio, CoreML, and the Apple Neural Engine. Install with:

```sh
brew install --cask rcourtman/parakey/parakey
```
